title: Test HVAC Installation

items.description: HVAC System Supply and Installation (including all components as per specifications)
items.notes: All materials will meet or exceed local building codes.
This includes disposal fees for all debris generated.

specifications: Obtaining and paying for all required permits
items.notes: This includes any additional electrical work needed.

specifications: Comprehensive testing of all system components
items.notes: We will ensure the system operates at peak efficiency.

terms_conditions: All work will be performed in accordance with applicable building codes and industry standards.
Client is responsible for providing clear access to the work area.
Changes to the scope of work will be subject to additional charges.
This quote is valid for 30 days from the date of issue.
payment_terms: 50% deposit upon signing the contract, 50% upon completion and final inspection.
delivery_terms: N/A - this is an installation project.
warranty_terms: One-year parts and labor warranty on all installed components.
special_requirements: Client to provide access to electrical and gas supply.
Client to specify any special requirements for system features (e.g., smart thermostat) prior to commencement of work.
